summary.text: The question asks to search X for posts between 2026-07-09 and 2026-07-13 from these accounts: @miroshark_ @aeonframework. Focus on launches, announcements, and any brag about a security fix merged in...First, the query needs to be crafted for x_keyword_search.

content.text:
**Relevant posts (launches/announcements only; none matched security fix brags; none on 2026-07-09; all non-retweets):**

**@aeonframework**  
aeon v.0.1 is now live ⭐  
aeon is the best framework to build Apex Agents, agents that don't just execute tasks but also self-evolve to become the best at what they do.  
We've worked hard in the past few weeks to improve & make aeon easier to run. The first stable release is out, after being used extensively by 70 partners & incorporating their feedback ⭐  
**Date:** Fri, 10 Jul 2026 13:44:09 GMT  
**Engagement:** likes=69, retweets=11, replies=7  
**Link:** https://x.com/aeonframework/status/2075576813850403049

**@aeonframework**  
https://github.com/aaronjmars/aeon/releases/tag/v0.1.0  
**Date:** Fri, 10 Jul 2026 13:44:10 GMT  
**Engagement:** likes=4, retweets=1, replies=1  
**Link:** https://x.com/aeonframework/status/2075576818271203830

**@aeonframework**  
What's included in this release:  
- Support for other harnesses (@grok & more)  
- Improved channel support (Instant mode in Telegram, new commands, email, etc)  
- Global simplification of the codebase (fewer skills, dependencies & more)  
- New Open Knowledge Format (by @Google) support  
- Attestation support for skills - prove what you've run, onchain or offchain  
- Observability opt-in (@langfuse)  
**Date:** Fri, 10 Jul 2026 13:44:10 GMT  
**Engagement:** likes=6, retweets=1, replies=1  
**Link:** https://x.com/aeonframework/status/2075576816665018716

**@aeonframework**  
As the @robinhood chain is getting a lot of attention lately, we remind you that its MCP is also live on the @aeonframework!  
**Date:** Fri, 10 Jul 2026 13:27:03 GMT  
**Engagement:** likes=36, retweets=4, replies=0  
**Link:** https://x.com/aeonframework/status/2075572511484317906

**@aeonframework**  
Let's spotlight another promising project building with the @aeonframework  
▶️@tryskopos, an agentic cross-chain DeFi platform  
tx-explain + token-safety, built natively on top of what aeon ships now plus additional support for 10 chains instead of base-only  
They also shipped the market reads (defi/narrative/trending/fear-greed) and an x402 pulse read skill with the same cross-chain style  
Have a look at the clip below 👷🔊
